name: Roshni Satpathy
text: I had the pleasure of working with Ashutosh Dash as his client, and I was truly impressed with his expertise in Frontend Development, React, and JavaScript. He has a great eye for detail, communicates clearly, and always delivers high-quality work on time. Ashutosh not only understood the requirements quickly but also suggested valuable improvements, making the final outcome even better. His mix of technical skill and problem-solving ability makes him a reliable and talented UI/Frontend Developer I would highly recommend.

name: Biswajit Dash
text: Being of my best mentor and friend, It will be by pleasure to recommend Ashutosh. I am impressed with his work ethic and communication skills. I was a great fan of his design and development of website with React and other UI platform. I think he is best fit to the web development and basically to the front-end part. He is not only a good developer but also a good mentor, with best skill set for R&D and adopting new technologies.

name: Suraj Roy
text: I highly recommend my former college junior Ashutosh. I had the pleasure of working closely with him on numerous projects during our time together in college. Not only did we collaborate effectively as colleagues, but I also had the opportunity to be a client for one of our projects, where he played a crucial role in developing my portfolio. Ashutosh possesses exceptional web development skills, consistently delivering high-quality work on all our projects. His proficiency in frontend technologies is impressive and his ability to turn ideas into functional and aesthetically pleasing web applications is commendable. Moreover, his soft skills are equally impressive. He is an excellent communicator, a dependable team player, and has a strong work ethic. His dedication to meeting deadlines and his willingness to go the extra mile to ensure client satisfaction make him an asset to any team. I have no doubt that he will continue to excel in his role and contribute significantly to the success of the company. He is not only a talented developer but also a person of integrity and professionalism. I wholeheartedly endorse him and believe he will be a valuable addition to any organization fortunate enough to have him on board.
